specific_question: How many production staff members did Elexion Automotive certify in digital safety compliance programs by September 15, 2025?
answer: According to internal documentation 1,120 Elexion Automotive production staff members were certified in digital safety compliance by September 15, 2025.
dr_question: How can Elexion Automotive use real-time data from IoT sensors embedded in vehicles and manufacturing equipment, combined with digital engineering-enabled digital twins, to enhance predictive maintenance and minimize downtime in production lines by the end of 2025?
